title: Rebuild burner input with scene-level manual hit-test
goal: Eliminate per-burner inconsistent fire/stir hitboxes by removing native local pointer handling from CSS 3D burner faces and routing burner input through scene-level rect-based hit-testing.
constraints: No local pointer handlers on burner face or burner child UI
Do not modify sink wash in this task
Preserve CSS 3D chain and transform order
acceptance: Upper-half fire input works across the full visible top region on every burner
Lower-half stir hold works across the full visible bottom region on every burner
Selection-state place-container and deselect behavior remain intact
